stemHtml: Consider a piston-engined aircraft. In which case is a separate engine-driven fuel pump always required?

options.a: For operating in sub-zero temperatures, to prevent fuel waxing.
options.b: To facilitate fuel flow when the fuel tank is located above the engine.
options.c: When there is a fuel filter located between the fuel tank and the engine.
options.d: To supply positive fuel pressure to a fuel injection system.
